title: URL Space Traps, Structural Fingerprints, Soft Errors, and Stop Evidence · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers url space traps, structural fingerprints, soft errors, and stop evidence into a changed trap detection and bounded containment policy. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of trap detection and bounded containment policy with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Detect temporal, pagination, facet, search, session, nonce, sort, repeated-segment, depth, and parameter-combination expansion.
Bound distinct path templates, query keys, values, combinations, depths, and pages per class with owned exceptions.
Combine status, redirect, title, main text, structure, known markers, and repetition to classify soft error and challenge pages.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Trap Features
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 3166 during an owner-approved community information audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to contain calendar, query, session, structure, and soft-error traps with bounded incident evidence; owner permission, robots preference, and legal-review conclusions stay distinct; then change one tokenizer, goquery, selector, domain constructor, record, link, frontier, or trap case and retain rejected evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Detect temporal, pagination, facet, search, session, nonce, sort, repeated-segment, depth, and parameter-combination expansion.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Containment Incident
